national.trend_chart_aria: Chart showing community activity trends over time

meta.title: Caring Community - National Dashboard
meta.description: Cross-cooperative super-admin view across every Caring Community cooperative on the platform. Member counts are reported in privacy-preserving brackets.

about.title: About this dashboard
about.body_prefix: Caring Community is a methodology for community-based care coordination. This super-admin dashboard aggregates metrics across every NEXUS cooperative running the Caring Community programme nationally - giving the national
about.body_suffix: foundation a cross-cooperative view of hours exchanged, member participation, and cooperative health. Member counts are shown as privacy-preserving brackets (e.g. "50-99") rather than exact numbers.
about.health_prefix: Use the period selector to compare quarters. The comparative table ranks cooperatives by hours, members, or health status. Health status is derived from activity trends:
about.struggling_definition: declining activity or very low engagement.

health_legend.title: Health status key:
health_legend.thriving: hours growing strongly (>10% vs prior period)
health_legend.struggling: declining activity or fewer than 5 verified hours in period
health_legend.privacy_note: Member counts shown as privacy-preserving brackets (e.g. "50-99") - no individual data is ever surfaced here.

comparative.title: Comparative metrics
comparative.empty_suffix: and set the tenant category to
comparative.empty_tail: on at least one tenant to populate this dashboard.
comparative.hours_title: Total verified care hours in the selected period
comparative.members_title: Active member count shown as a privacy-preserving bracket
comparative.tandems_title: Recurring helper/recipient pairs with 2+ completed exchanges
comparative.retention_title: % of members active in both this period and the prior equivalent period
comparative.reciprocity_title: % of supporters who also received hours in the period - indicates mutual exchange health

empty.no_active_cooperatives: No active cooperatives in this period.

footer.privacy_note: Member counts are reported in privacy-preserving brackets - no individual member identifiers are shown anywhere on this page.
